runtime_buffers.name: k

runtime_buffers.name: v
runtime_buffers.desc: Value tensor [kv_heads, seq_len, head_dim], strided layout (KV cache)

params.name: kv_stride_tokens
params.desc: Stride in tokens for KV cache layout

strategies.name: head
strategies.notes: Parallelize across heads; each thread handles one or more heads.

constraints.notes: Flash attention variant that rounds K/V through FP16 to match llama.cpp flash-attn input handling.

impl.c_declaration: void attention_forward_causal_head_major_gqa_flash_strided_f16kv(const float *q, const float *k, const float *v, float *output, int num_heads, int num_kv_heads, int num_tokens, int head_dim, int aligned_head_dim, int kv_stride_tokens);

parity.notes: Compare against llama.cpp ggml_flash_attn_ext with F16-rounded K/V inputs.

notes: Causal multi-head attention with GQA support. Uses FP16-rounded K/V inputs to emulate llama.cpp flash-attn numerics for Llama-family models.
